component.name: LightDeck
component.summary: System monitoring and LED control for Linux

description.p: LightDeck is a system monitoring and RGB LED control application for Linux. It provides real-time hardware monitoring with gradient-arc gauge dials, Grafana-style sparkline graphs, a transparent gaming overlay, and desktop widgets.

ul.li: 21 hardware sensors — CPU, GPU, fans, thermals, RAM, NVMe, battery, network
Auto-detects your hardware and tunes thresholds (AMD Ryzen, Intel, NVIDIA, AMD GPU)
39 LED effect presets from 12 ecosystems (OpenRGB, Hue, Chroma, iCUE, Aura, and more)
Gaming overlay — transparent HUD with configurable opacity and stats
Desktop widgets — floating sensor containers, resizable, auto-reshaping
Plugin driver system for community hardware support
Zero telemetry. Zero phone-home. Full sarcasm.
